name: Oriental Beef and Couscous
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook couscous according to package directions on the range top, omitting margarine or butter and salt.
2. For sauce, stir together preserves, soy sauce, gingerroot, and crushed red pepper; set aside.
3. Thinly slice steak on the bias into bite-size strips.
4. Place beef strips in a 1 1/2-quart casserole. Cover and micro-cook at high power (100% power) for 5 or 6 minutes (8 to 9 minutes if low-wattage oven). Remove meat and discard juices.
5. In the casserole, place mushrooms, green and red pepper strips, and green onions. Pour sauce mixture over vegetables. Toss gently until mixed. Cover and micro-cook at high power for 4 to 5 minutes (7 to 8 minutes if low-wattage oven) or until pepper strips are crisp-tender, stirring after every minute.
6. Stir together vinegar and cornstarch, then add the mixture to the casserole. Stir in meat. Micro-cook uncovered at high power for 3 to 4 minutes (5 to 6 minutes if low-wattage oven) or until the mixture is thick and bubbly, stirring after every minute.
7. Serve with cooked couscous or rice.
